title: Fountain and Loot Bags
prompt: Generate exactly one square 2x2 sprite sheet for a top-down survivor game's world pickups. Output exactly one image only. Put four separate isolated gameplay objects on a transparent background. If transparency is impossible, use a perfectly flat pure white background with no texture or gradient. Leave generous spacing between all objects for clean cropping. No scene, no floor, no text, no UI. Style target: polished Brotato-like 2D object readability with bold outlines, simple shading, clear silhouettes, and clean collectible readability. Layout: top-left Fountain, a healing fountain interactable with magical water glow. Top-right Black loot bag, dark rarity money bag dropped by enemies. Bottom-left Red loot bag, aggressive mid-rarity money bag. Bottom-right Yellow loot bag, premium high-rarity money bag. All four should look game-ready and consistent with the mini Chadpocalypse art style.
